_comment: Committed connection config — env-var placeholders ONLY, never a real token (tracked file). The gateway connection starts when AURA_MCP_TOKEN is set (an aura_... management token minted in Aura → Fleet → Agent Tokens): on devices via the shell env, in claude.ai cloud environments via the environment's env vars. Unset, the server is skipped silently. See files/references/connect.md for token minting, scoping, and the high-risk-write opt-in.
